prompt: A single bush, game decoration sprite, isolated on a FULLY TRANSPARENT background (PNG alpha, no backdrop, no ground plane, no cast shadow — the game engine adds the ground shadow itself). The bush sits upright, roughly centered horizontally, its base near the lower part of the canvas. Soft flat ambient light, board-game hand-painted look. Nothing else in the image — one bush only, fully transparent everywhere outside the bush.
